# vault-cli

> Deterministic CLI primitives for a Claude Code + Obsidian vault agent setup. Skills call this CLI for deterministic work (file ops, state mutations, router lookups, frontmatter audits, skill scaffolding). The LLM is left to do only judgment.

The architectural anchor for the "LLMs offload deterministic work to scripts" pattern. v0.1 wraps existing hook scripts (so nothing breaks) plus ships native primitives for skill scaffolding/checking, frontmatter audit, router validation, and append-only learnings writes. Pure Node.js 22, no dependencies.

## Docs

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/README.md): full architecture, install, what v0.1 ships, migration plan.
- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/AGENTS.md): operating protocol for agents installing or calling this CLI.

## Implementation

- [src/cli.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/cli.js): top-level dispatcher.
- [src/commands/distill.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/distill.js): wraps auto-distill-readwise.sh + state ops.
- [src/commands/resurface.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/resurface.js): wraps learnings-resurface.sh + state ops.
- [src/commands/session.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/session.js): session archive ops.
- [src/commands/voice-memo.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/voice-memo.js): voice memo file ops.
- [src/commands/router.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/router.js): Knowledge Router lookup + validation.
- [src/commands/frontmatter.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/frontmatter.js): YAML frontmatter audit + backfill.
- [src/commands/learnings.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/learnings.js): append-only writes to _learnings.md.
- [src/commands/skill.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/skill.js): scaffold + check Claude Code skills.
- [src/commands/state.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/state.js): state file inspection.
- [src/commands/today.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/commands/today.js): ephemeral working-memory artifact (Today.md) — path / read / stale / regenerate.
- [src/lib/config.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/lib/config.js): env-var driven path resolution.
- [src/lib/frontmatter.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/lib/frontmatter.js): YAML parser + validator.
- [src/lib/state.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/src/lib/state.js): atomic state-file ops.

## Related

- [ai-knowledge-system](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/ai-knowledge-system): memory pattern this CLI's router commands target.
- [vault-conventions](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-conventions): frontmatter schema this CLI validates.
- [learnings-resurface](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/learnings-resurface): cron + skill that `vault resurface run` wraps.
- [note-highlight-indexer](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/note-highlight-indexer): cron + skill that `vault distill run` wraps.
- [agentic-architecture-map](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/agentic-architecture-map): the architecture-tracking pattern this CLI represents a structural change to.
- [claude-code-setup](https://github.com/derekcedarbaum2/claude-code-setup): the public PM Claude Code setup this CLI consolidates.

## Optional

- [LICENSE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derekcedarbaum2/vault-cli/main/LICENSE): MIT.
